hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(i.tool_input?.command||'').toLowerCase();const blocked=['rm -rf /','drop table','drop database','format c:','del /s /q c:\\'];for(const b of blocked){if(cmd.includes(b)){console.error('[Guard] BLOCKED: destructive pattern detected: '+b);process.exit(2)}}console.log(d)}catch(e){console.log(d)}})"
